68d7483c23ecd621bd0ceb4e.leadin: The last professional photograph of John Lennon, captured just hours before his murder in 1980, was taken with one of this company’s cameras. For 10 points each:
68d7483c23ecd621bd0ceb4e.leadin_sanitized: The last professional photograph of John Lennon, captured just hours before his murder in 1980, was taken with one of this company's cameras. For 10 points each:

This photographer used a Polaroid camera to take the last professional photograph of John Lennon. This photographer was the first woman to hold an exhibition at America’s National Portrait Gallery, and her other works include the 2015 Vanity Fair cover in which Caitlyn Jenner came out as transgender.

Until her death in 2004, this writer and philosopher was Annie Leibovitz’s long-term partner. This author contrasted the work of Diane Arbus with pictures from the Great Depression in her 1977 essay collection On Photography.

answers: Polaroid (“Hey Ya!” includes the repeated line “Shake it like a Polaroid picture”)
